hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 930 m from property

snippets.snippet: The hotel very comfortable and great location
Very good facilities, location and staff
The hotel is very clean and it's comfortable.

address.address1: Jalan Teuku Umar No.350, Baiturrahman, Banda Aceh, Aceh, Indonesia

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. As an added bonus, restaurant is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Excellent

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Need and tidy ,have a good breakfast,helpful staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: There are many foodstalls of various cuisines and also laundries nearby the hotel. Masjid Musyahadah is at walking distance. Masjid Baitulrahman, Tsunami Musuem and Aceh Museum is not far and can easily reach by trishaw motor (cheap) or taxi passing infront the hotel frequently.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: The bathroom was dirty, you could see the black dirt on the ceilings and the toilet was leaking.
comments.reviewPositives: The place is good, you can reach the main objects by feet, they prepared us a breakfast boxes since we had to leave early

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel very comfortable and great location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Lo primero nombrar al personal, muy amables y disponibles. Tuvimos que ponernos en contacto por el check in debido al horario en que llegamos y nos pusieron todas las facilidades para tener lista la habitación nada más llegar. El hotel es cómodo, limpio y tranquilo. El desayuno es abundante y delicioso. Aire acondicionado y wifi que funcionan bien. Agua caliente. Ofrecen agua mineral gratuita. Buena ubicación para visitar la ciudad.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The best👍🏻👍🏻

comments.reviewPositives: Tout parfait

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Friendly staff..very helpful...Saya perlu ke airport awal pagi Tanpa sempat breakfast..hotel Ni siap bekalkan roti dan air untuk kam masa kami check outi..rata2 kami stay Kat hotel lain xde buat mcm Ni..Harga menu Makanan pun Murah..kalau Kat Malaysia Harga Warung je...
comments.reviewTitle: Any Malaysian yg Nak dtg visit Aceh.. seventeen Hotel Ni sesuai untuk korang..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Service staff are lovely and very helpful. The hotel is very clean and it's comfortable. Well priced for the hotel. Would highly recommend this place!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: 地理位置不错 早餐是传统的印尼早餐 员工也很友好 服务很好 可以寄存行李

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Bilik Family Room  tiada tingkap,  Pintu tandas jenis yang tidak boleh dikunci.  Semasa sarapan pagi, mangkuk dan bekas makanan kotor beselerak di atas meja, tiada staf yang datang bersihkan meja makan.  Penghuni terpaksa menunggu meja dibersihkan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: El personal és molt atent i t'ajuda amb tot el que et calgi. És molt net. Esta a prop de tots els llocs d'intetères.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotelnya bersih, petugasnya ramah dan breakfast nya juga enak.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Amenities were adequate, the cleaning crew was top notch. Breakfast servings had nice variety and the crew was always very open to requests in spite of the language barrier.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Mantapp

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Stayes for only 1 night but it was fine,
we got 2 twin room and they were spacious and clean, very comfortable.

comments.reviewTitle: Spacious and comfortable stay within the city center

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Semuanya bagus.. cuma liftnya yg ngak ada.. capek jg naik turun  tangga

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Room lightning are too dim for me.
comments.reviewPositives: Location wise is good, nearby stores and eateries. Staff is exceptional. They are very helpful and polite. During check-in I informed them that we will going out very early the next day, so instead of normal breakfast time start at 7:00 am they served breakfast the next day at 6:00 am to accommodate us! Got problem with my shower and they fixed the issue immediately.  Room is clean.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kamarnya bersih,sarapan pagi nya enak enak banget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: My room was not clean (e.g., lots of hair on the floor, stains on the sheet, toilet paper was wet and dirty), there were different kind of insects in the room and people were smoking even in places where signs indicated not to smoke. When I woke up there was a little blood on the sheet so I may have been bitten by some insects at night. My more pricy room with a window did not pay off as the view is limited due to a wall that is placed appr. 30 cm away from the window. In North Sumatra, I had way better value-for-money places which is why I would chose another hotel next time.
comments.reviewPositives: Great Indonesian breakfast and friendly staff
comments.reviewTitle: Not worth the money and insects in the room

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Saya menikmati suasana menyenangkan di hotel seventeen, kebersihan dan keramahan stafnya, Kamar mandi nya juga bersih serta perlengkapan nya berfungsi dg baik, akomodasi yg baik hanya saja ukuran kamar nya tidak dapat dikatakan lapang bahkan agak kecil

comments.reviewComments: Kasur lembab, bau, sempit, dan sangat berisik sampai kedengeran suara2 lain, mulai dari penyambutan di parkir sampai ke ygbersih2 dan petugas di restoran juga tidak ramah sama sekali

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Uda 2x Nginap Disini..Gak Pernah Mengecewakan..Sarapan Nya Juga Enak..Hotel Bersih Dan Terawat..Dari Staff - Security Ramah..Lokasi Mudah Di Jangkau..Fasilitas Ok..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Rekomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Kamar bersih dan luas tiap hari dibeesihkan , kamar mandi bersih  ada air hangat, handuk tiap hari ganti, sarapan enak terutama dendeng nya, nyaman nginap disini staf nya ramah karena itu saya nambah 4 hari lagi disini.
RS dekat apotik dekat indomart,  DIY, RM Padang banyak , memang harga agak lehih mahal dari hotel setara, tapi sebanding lah denga fasilitas yg diberikan, terimakasih seventeen InsyaAllah balik nginep disini lagi.
